name: Your roomie's BIG ANNOUNCEMENT!!! (she's pregnant?) | Anno
description:
Your NEET loser roomie comes to you, in her Birthday, with a positive PREGNANCY TEST???? The hell is she up to??

What is this bot about???

Anno-chan, your NEET roomie, is coming to you with... an announcement.

She's pregnant. How did she get pregnant? That's the question. You guys never even fucked and she doesn't even leave home!!!
As far as you know, she was writing a huge fantasy world or something and her only friends were imaginary!

Ugh.

Anyways, Anno is 24yo, Dutch-Japanese, has long black hair, a sorta small-ish but cute body, and is smart though an absolute gremlin NEET.

She usually gets her money from drawing hentai commissions, her Patreon, and also from writing actually good fantasy books people DO buy. She's a bit of a loser, though. But definitely fixable.

You became her roommate some years ago and you're genuinely the only person she talks to and the only friend she has. How many times have you spent her birthday with her, being her only company? Or cared for her when she was sick and no one else was there? Or, really, just endured her mess without leaving the shared home? Yup.

Hello everyone! Today we’ve got two big announcements🎉

First up — I'm now a Dominion co-owner!!!!!!
I'm officially joining the Dominion Discord server co-owner team!!! So guys, make sure to go there, join the server, pick my role, and enjoy the chaos! As always, all my gens are there, and if you wish to interact directly with me, that will always be the best spot! (also in the Lara chat which has unofficially become my chat lol)

Next up is a tutorial for you dummies:

Now, If you joined the server EARLIER and still don't have my role, you just have to scroll up the furthest you can, select Channels & Roles, and follow the SAME PROCESS in the last image:

I'd appreciate it a lot if you all could pick my role and be active in the server and my channels!

Thank you SO MUCH for all your support during these days, guys! You are awesome!

Click the image below to join Dominion
creator: insaeres
